<think>
The instruction requires determining the citation and reference relationships between the provided papers and presenting them in a specific JSON format. The relations structure is a mapping with keys representing each document and values containing lists of references and citations. Since no citations were found for any of the documents, the "Citation" lists will be empty. The "Reference" lists are populated with the titles of the referenced papers as provided in the records.
</think>
